chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-357 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For Hearing of CMA 1628/25 2.For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Solangi, Advocate along with both petitioners. Mr. Mansoor Ali Shaikh, Deputy P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w SIP/IO Ghulam Safdar, Anti-Rape Cell, Ghotki. ***** Mr. Shamsuddin Kobhar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record. Learned AAG files statements on behalf of respondents No.2&5, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. The I.O is present and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 CrPC, who in her statement, has denied the allegations mentioned in FIR and further submits that in view of such statement he will file report before the concerned Magistrate by disposing of the FIR as cancelled under C- class. After such statement, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the petition; however, prays that directions may be issued for protection. Under the above circumstances, the I.O is directed to submit report, as suggested by him within 15 days before the concerned Magistrate in view of that 161 CrPC statement of petitioner No.1. The I.O and official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
